completed_workflow_steps.name: Gather milestone goals
completed_workflow_steps.notes: Theme A locked: Field-Operations Polish, 7 in-scope todos

completed_workflow_steps.name: Cleanup and commit
completed_workflow_steps.notes: phases clear was destructive but caught + restored before commit; see todo gsd-new-milestone-phases-clear-destructive

completed_workflow_steps.name: Research decision
completed_workflow_steps.rationale: All 7 features are well-defined captured todos with implementation notes; no new tech; pitfalls already known from hardware testing

remaining_workflow_steps.name: Define REQUIREMENTS.md
remaining_workflow_steps.notes: Derive REQ-IDs from the 7 in-scope todos. Suggested category prefixes: LOCALE, UX, ADMIN, FIX, SALE. Confirm categories with user before generating.

remaining_workflow_steps.name: Create roadmap
remaining_workflow_steps.notes: Spawn gsd-roadmapper agent. Continue phase numbering from 7 (v1.0 ended at phase 6). Do NOT pass --reset-phase-numbers.

out_of_scope_todos.reason: Deferred to v1.2+; requires fresh permission/identification design
GSD framework tooling note, not project scope

human_actions_pending.context: User triggered the auto-update in parallel during the v1.1 milestone start. Auto-update path validated 0.1.0→0.1.1→0.1.2 earlier; 0.1.3 should also work because the artifactName fix is what fixed the prior 404. Status unconfirmed when handoff written.

blocking_constraints.name: DO NOT re-run /gsd-new-milestone
blocking_constraints.description: Step 6 of /gsd-new-milestone runs `phases clear --confirm` which silently DELETES all files under .planning/phases/. This is destructive when the previous milestone was archived manually (which v1.0 was). The deletion was caught and restored via `git restore .planning/phases/` BEFORE it could be committed in this session, but re-running /gsd-new-milestone would re-trigger it. PROJECT.md + STATE.md are already updated for v1.1 (commit c60d0be), so the workflow does NOT need to be re-run from the start. Resume by executing Steps 8-11 INLINE in the new session.
blocking_constraints.mitigation: Read .planning/todos/pending/2026-04-14-gsd-new-milestone-phases-clear-destructive.md for the full context. Execute the remaining /gsd-new-milestone steps (8 research decision → 9 requirements → 10 roadmap → 11 done) INLINE without invoking the slash command. The gsd-roadmapper subagent CAN still be invoked normally for Step 10 — only the orchestrator wrapper is the problem.

decisions.decision: v1.1 theme = Field-Operations Polish (no new ambition, just close gaps from v1.0 hardware testing)
decisions.rationale: User confirmed Theme A. The 7 in-scope todos are sufficient; the kiosk needs a stable validated baseline before any new feature work.

decisions.decision: Skip research at the milestone level
decisions.rationale: All 7 features are well-defined captured todos with implementation notes (file paths, code snippets, edge cases). No new tech, no new architecture. Per-phase research can be enabled later via /gsd-plan-phase --research if a specific phase needs it.

decisions.decision: Continue phase numbering from 7 (do NOT pass --reset-phase-numbers)
decisions.rationale: v1.0 ended at phase 6. v1.1 phases will be 07, 08, etc. Avoids collision with the v1.0 phase directories which are still in .planning/phases/ (not archived because the previous milestone was completed manually, not via /gsd-complete-milestone).

decisions.decision: Reintroduce NFC member identification deferred to v1.2+
decisions.rationale: Requires fresh permission/identification design — either a Magicline role with member-lookup permissions (which the gym owner does not want to grant), or an alternative mechanism (manual member ID entry, QR code, etc.). Not v1.1 scope.

next_action: Read .planning/HANDOFF.json + .planning/.continue-here.md + .planning/PROJECT.md + .planning/STATE.md + the 7 in-scope todo files. Then ask the user to confirm category prefixes for REQ-IDs (suggested: LOCALE, UX, ADMIN, FIX, SALE — but the 7 todos may map cleanly to fewer categories, e.g. all under POL- or split differently). Once confirmed, draft REQUIREMENTS.md and present the full requirement list inline for approval per /gsd-new-milestone Step 9.
context_notes: v1.1 milestone is fully scoped and committed at the project level — only the requirements + roadmap artifacts are missing. The user is doing a parallel auto-update test on the kiosk during this handoff (0.1.2 → 0.1.3 via the welcome-logout post-reset trigger). When resuming, the kiosk task is independent and can be ignored unless the user reports it.
